summary: Comprehensive testing of EVMart E-Commerce Platform for Electric Vehicles. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all major flows including home page, products, cart, checkout, registration, login, and admin panel.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All API responses correctly exclude MongoDB _id field
JWT authentication properly implemented with Bearer token
Admin-only routes correctly protected with 401/403 responses
Cart and auth state properly persisted in localStorage

test_credentials.customer: Created via /register with any email/password (min 6 chars)

seed_data_creation: 5 EV scooters seeded on startup: Aero EV1, Velocity X, EcoRider Pro, City Glide, Urban Bolt
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_evmart_api.py cover auth, products CRUD, orders. Frontend tested via Playwright for home, products, product detail, cart, checkout, login, register, admin panel. Payment is MOCKED as expected for student project.

backend: GET /api/products/{id} - Returns single product with all fields
POST /api/auth/register - Creates new user, returns token
POST /api/auth/login - Admin login returns admin token
GET /api/auth/me - Returns current user with Bearer token
POST /api/products - 401 without token, 403 with customer token, success with admin
POST /api/orders - Requires auth, creates order with correct total
GET /api/orders/me - Returns only current user's orders
No MongoDB _id field leaks in any response
frontend: Home page loads with hero, 4 featured products, sustainability section, footer with project credits
Products page shows all scooters with working search and sort
Product detail page with color selector, qty +/-, Add to Cart
Add to Cart from card and detail page - cart badge updates
Cart page with qty increment/decrement, remove item, total calculated correctly
Checkout form validation works, Place Order redirects to /order-success
Login with admin credentials routes to /admin
Register creates account and logs user in
Admin panel: Products tab with list, Add/Edit/Delete dialogs
Admin panel: Orders tab shows placed orders

mocked_apis.payment_gateway: Checkout/payment is MOCKED - order creates DB record but no real payment processed
